description: PRE-2 Truth-Set for Slice 4 RL-Reward weight tuning. 30 user-labeled cuts.
instructions: 2. For each cut, watch and label as 'good' (👍) / 'bad' (👎) / 'neutral'
3. Capture audio_features (rms, vocal_energy, drum_energy, etc.) and video_features (motion_score, mood_cluster, shot_type) at cut-time
4. Save 30 labeled cuts (10 per track) to tests/fixtures/pacing_truth_set.json

schema.run_id: string — uuid of the auto-edit run
schema.cut_id: int — sequential cut index in the run
schema.timestamp_ms: int — cut position in audio in ms

audio_features.section_type: string — verse | chorus | drop | bridge | outro
